item.text: {"task_id":"aggregate-v1","answer":["I’ll read only input.json in one shell command and compute the requested aggregates.","",""]}

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "jq -r 'group_by(.region)[] | . as "'$rows | ($rows | map(.quantity) | add) as $qty | ($rows | map(.quantity * .unit_price_cents) | add) as $rev | ($rows | group_by(.sku) | map({sku: .[0].sku, revenue: (map(.quantity * .unit_price_cents) | add)}) | sort_by(-.revenue, .sku) | .[0].sku) as $top | "'"\\("'$rows[0].region)|'"\\("'$qty)|'"\\("'$rev)|'"\\("'$top)"'"' input.json"

/bin/zsh -lc "jq -r 'group_by(.region)[] | . as "'$rows | ($rows | map(.quantity) | add) as $qty | ($rows | map(.quantity * .unit_price_cents) | add) as $rev | ($rows | group_by(.sku) | map({sku: .[0].sku, revenue: (map(.quantity * .unit_price_cents) | add)}) | sort_by(-.revenue, .sku) | .[0].sku) as $top | "'"\\("'$rows[0].region)|'"\\("'$qty)|'"\\("'$rev)|'"\\("'$top)"'"' input.json"
item.aggregated_output: jq: error (at input.json:14): null (null) and null (null) cannot be multiplied

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "jq -r '.sales | group_by(.region)[] | . as "'$r | ($r|map(.quantity)|add) as $q | ($r|map(.quantity*.price_cents)|add) as $v | ($r|group_by(.sku)|map({s:.[0].sku,v:(map(.quantity*.price_cents)|add)})|sort_by(-.v,.s)|.[0].s) as $t | "'"\\("'$r[0].region)|'"\\("'$q)|'"\\("'$v)|'"\\("'$t)"'"' input.json"

/bin/zsh -lc "jq -r '.sales | group_by(.region)[] | . as "'$r | ($r|map(.quantity)|add) as $q | ($r|map(.quantity*.price_cents)|add) as $v | ($r|group_by(.sku)|map({s:.[0].sku,v:(map(.quantity*.price_cents)|add)})|sort_by(-.v,.s)|.[0].s) as $t | "'"\\("'$r[0].region)|'"\\("'$q)|'"\\("'$v)|'"\\("'$t)"'"' input.json"
item.aggregated_output: jq: error (at input.json:14): Cannot index array with string "sales"
